title: navarretia myersii subsp. deminuta
intro: Navarretia myersii subsp. deminuta, also known as the Del Mar fairy-candle, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the phlox family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Navarretia myersii subsp. deminuta include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
